headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' https://hcaptcha.com https://*.hcaptcha.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://hcaptcha.com https://*.hcaptcha.com; img-src 'self' https:; connect-src 'self' https://hcaptcha.com https://*.hcaptcha.com; frame-src https://hcaptcha.com https://*.hcaptcha.com; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; form-action 'self'; upgrade-insecure-requests
